scenarios.title: Flat rate margin calculation with higher short market value

given_steps.step_text: Positions are identified per §3.2.2 with sub-margin groups defined on HKEX website
given_steps.step_pattern: Positions are identified per §3.2.2 with sub-margin groups defined on HKEX website

given_steps.step_text: Sub-group 1 contains long positions with total absolute market value of 30,000,000 HKD
given_steps.step_pattern: Sub-group 1 contains long positions with total absolute market value of 30,000,000 HKD

given_steps.step_text: Sub-group 1 contains short positions with total absolute market value of 60,000,000 HKD
given_steps.step_pattern: Sub-group 1 contains short positions with total absolute market value of 60,000,000 HKD

when_steps.step_text: Flat rate margin calculation is performed for sub-group 1
when_steps.step_pattern: Flat rate margin calculation is performed for sub-group 1

then_steps.step_text: All short sub-group 1 positions are included in the flat rate margin calculation
then_steps.step_pattern: All short sub-group 1 positions are included in the flat rate margin calculation

then_steps.step_text: All long sub-group 1 positions are excluded from the flat rate margin calculation
then_steps.step_pattern: All long sub-group 1 positions are excluded from the flat rate margin calculation

then_steps.step_text: The product of absolute position market value and flat margin rate is summed
then_steps.step_pattern: The product of absolute position market value and flat margin rate is summed

then_steps.step_text: Flat rate margin multiplier is applied to obtain final flat rate margin
then_steps.step_pattern: Flat rate margin multiplier is applied to obtain final flat rate margin

assumptions: Flat margin rates under FieldType 3 are available
Margin multiplier is obtained from Daily Participant Margin Multiplier Report (DWH0081C)

scenarios.title: Calculate favorable MTM using portfolio values

given_steps.step_text: A clearing participant portfolio with Market valuePortfolio of -300,550,000
given_steps.step_pattern: A clearing participant portfolio with Market valuePortfolio of -300,550,000

given_steps.step_text: Contract valuePortfolio of -287,850,000
given_steps.step_pattern: Contract valuePortfolio of -287,850,000

when_steps.step_text: The system calculates favorable MTM using the formula: Market valuePortfolio - Contract valuePortfolio
when_steps.step_pattern: The system calculates favorable MTM using the formula: Market valuePortfolio - Contract valuePortfolio

then_steps.step_text: Favorable MTM equals -12,700,000
then_steps.step_pattern: Favorable MTM equals -12,700,000

then_steps.step_text: The negative number refers to a MTM requirement
then_steps.step_pattern: The negative number refers to a MTM requirement

then_steps.step_text: Favorable MTM is zero when result is negative
then_steps.step_pattern: Favorable MTM is zero when result is negative

assumptions: Portfolio values are provided in HKD equivalent
Rounding is applied at position level as per Appendix 4.6

scenarios.title: Calculate net margin when favorable MTM is zero

given_steps.step_text: Rounded aggregated market-risk-component margin of 46,930,000
given_steps.step_pattern: Rounded aggregated market-risk-component margin of 46,930,000

given_steps.step_text: Favorable MTM equals zero due to negative MTM requirement result
given_steps.step_pattern: Favorable MTM equals zero due to negative MTM requirement result

when_steps.step_text: The system calculates net margin using: Maximum(0, Rounded aggregated market-risk-component margin – Favorable MTM)
when_steps.step_pattern: The system calculates net margin using: Maximum(0, Rounded aggregated market-risk-component margin – Favorable MTM)

then_steps.step_text: Net margin equals Maximum[0, (46,930,000 – 0)]
then_steps.step_pattern: Net margin equals Maximum[0, (46,930,000 – 0)]

then_steps.step_text: Net margin equals 46,930,000
then_steps.step_pattern: Net margin equals 46,930,000

assumptions: Boundary condition tests the Maximum function with zero favorable MTM
This represents the case where MTM requirement exists instead of favorable MTM

then_steps.step_pattern: Favorable MTM and MTM requirement are mutually exclusive

then_steps.step_text: Only one of favorable MTM or MTM requirement has a non-zero value
then_steps.step_pattern: Only one of favorable MTM or MTM requirement has a non-zero value

then_steps.step_text: Absolute value is shown in MTM and Margin Requirement Report
then_steps.step_pattern: Absolute value is shown in MTM and Margin Requirement Report

assumptions: Mutual exclusivity is enforced at the data validation level
Report displays absolute value of whichever is applicable

feature_description: Validates margin credit application and net margin after credit calculation for clearing participants.

then_steps.step_pattern: net margin after credit equals 41,930,000
